metadata.title: Product Bricks & Capabilities
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the mental-wellbeing-community-platform domain.

rootGroups.name: Member Experience
rootGroups.description: Member-facing support discovery, community participation, and habit-building capabilities.

bricks.name: Member Home and Intent Feed
bricks.description: Personalized member home that assembles topic cues, next-best actions, and recovery paths.

internalModules.title: Intent orchestration
internalModules.description: Builds personalized home modules from member context and recent support behavior.

interfaces.title: Home feed UI
interfaces.description: Primary member-facing home surface across web and mobile.

brickDependencies.description: Uses recommendation candidates to compose the member home.
Uses topic pathways to organize support entry points.

dataDependencies.description: Reads member identity and preference data.
Reads recent support behavior to personalize the home feed.

bricks.name: Topic and Pathway Taxonomy
bricks.description: Structured topic graph for everyday mental wellbeing concerns, life stages, and support journeys.

internalModules.title: Topic graph management
internalModules.description: Maintains topic definitions, synonyms, pathways, and cross-links.

interfaces.title: Topic taxonomy API
interfaces.description: Provides topic and pathway metadata to product surfaces.

bricks.name: Support Recommendations
bricks.description: Recommendation engine for live sessions, content, communities, and next-step support actions.

internalModules.title: Recommendation ranking
internalModules.description: Ranks support options using member behavior, topic affinity, and program context.

interfaces.title: Recommendation API
interfaces.description: Serves personalized support recommendations to member surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Uses intelligence features to improve support relevance.

dataDependencies.description: Learns from member support behavior.

bricks.name: Search and Topic Retrieval
bricks.description: Searches content, sessions, communities, and contributors by intent and topic.

internalModules.title: Unified support search
internalModules.description: Indexes support resources and retrieves relevant results by topic and format.

interfaces.title: Search UI and API
interfaces.description: Search interface for explicit member support intent.

brickDependencies.description: Uses topic metadata to improve query resolution.

bricks.name: Progress and Reflection Tracking
bricks.description: Tracks member reflections, streaks, saved support actions, and habit progress.

internalModules.title: Habit and reflection state
internalModules.description: Stores progress state and generates lightweight recovery prompts.

interfaces.title: Progress UI
interfaces.description: Member-facing progress and reflection surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Uses notification rules to sustain habit loops.

dataDependencies.description: Reads meaningful support actions to compute progress state.

bricks.name: Notifications and Reminders
bricks.description: Cross-channel reminders, event prompts, re-engagement nudges, and follow-up notifications.

internalModules.title: Notification rules engine
internalModules.description: Schedules and sends reminders across email, push, and in-product surfaces.

interfaces.title: Notification API
interfaces.description: Notification orchestration interface.

brickDependencies.description: Uses consent policy before sending notifications.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Depends on external messaging providers to deliver notifications.

dataDependencies.description: Reads consent preferences before messaging members.

bricks.name: Community Feed
bricks.description: Member-facing community feed for supportive posts, comments, and reactions.

internalModules.title: Community stream orchestration
internalModules.description: Assembles community content and moderation state for member view.

interfaces.title: Community feed UI
interfaces.description: Member-facing community stream.

brickDependencies.description: Uses safety decisions and content state before content is shown.

dataDependencies.description: Owns core community content objects.

bricks.name: Live Session Streaming
bricks.description: Schedules, streams, and manages live support sessions and event participation.

internalModules.title: Live session runtime
internalModules.description: Manages session setup, attendance, and live-state transitions.

interfaces.title: Live session UI
interfaces.description: Member and contributor live session experience.

brickDependencies.description: Uses session definitions and availability.
Uses moderation and escalation controls during live sessions.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Depends on third-party video delivery infrastructure.

dataDependencies.description: Writes session recordings for on-demand reuse when permitted.

bricks.name: Live Q&A and Ask-a-Question
bricks.description: Question submission, moderation, and response workflows for live and asynchronous support questions.

internalModules.title: Question intake and routing
internalModules.description: Captures participant questions and routes them through moderation and contributor workflows.

interfaces.title: Question UI
interfaces.description: Member-facing question and answer surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Uses moderation controls before questions are answered.

bricks.name: Topic Communities and Circles
bricks.description: Membership and participation model for topic-specific communities, circles, and cohort spaces.

internalModules.title: Community membership state
internalModules.description: Manages joins, follows, and participation settings for topic spaces.

interfaces.title: Community membership UI
interfaces.description: User experience for discovering and joining topic circles.

brickDependencies.description: Uses community content surfaces to make circles active.

bricks.name: In-Platform Messaging and Follow-Up
bricks.description: Scoped messaging and follow-up workflows for member continuity after sessions or support events.

internalModules.title: Secure follow-up messaging
internalModules.description: Supports bounded message threads and reminders tied to support actions.

interfaces.title: Messaging API
interfaces.description: Interface for structured follow-up communications.

brickDependencies.description: Uses privacy and consent controls before enabling follow-up messaging.

rootGroups.name: Employer Solutions
rootGroups.description: Employer packaging, onboarding, administration, analytics, and program orchestration capabilities.

bricks.name: Team Plan Packaging and Contracting
bricks.description: Employer packaging, pricing, seat logic, and contract lifecycle support.

internalModules.title: Commercial packaging rules
internalModules.description: Maintains team-plan pricing, seat structure, and contract terms.

interfaces.title: Commercial workflow UI
interfaces.description: Internal and employer-facing plan and contract workflows.

brickDependencies.description: Uses billing workflows for invoicing and recurring revenue operations.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Depends on CRM and contract-management systems.

dataDependencies.description: Creates and updates employer commercial state.

bricks.name: Organization Onboarding and Access Codes
bricks.description: Employer setup, employee access paths, launch configuration, and activation workflows.

internalModules.title: Onboarding state machine
internalModules.description: Tracks employer launch readiness, access code logic, and cohort activation.

interfaces.title: Onboarding UI
interfaces.description: Employer launch and configuration workflows.

brickDependencies.description: Uses identity provisioning to create admin and member access.

dataDependencies.description: Reads employer configuration and launch state.

bricks.name: Employer Admin Console
bricks.description: Operational control surface for employer program setup, access, and reviews.

internalModules.title: Employer operations shell
internalModules.description: Assembles employer controls, launch steps, and account health views.

interfaces.title: Admin console UI
interfaces.description: Employer-facing administrative workspace.

brickDependencies.description: Uses aggregate program reporting in the employer console.
Uses privacy rules to ensure employer-safe reporting.

dataDependencies.description: Reads employer account configuration.

bricks.name: Employer Engagement Analytics
bricks.description: Aggregate employer-safe analytics on activation, repeat use, topics, and event participation.

internalModules.title: Aggregate reporting service
internalModules.description: Builds employer-safe insights from member and event activity data.

interfaces.title: Employer reporting UI and API
interfaces.description: Aggregate reporting surfaces for employer buyers and operators.

brickDependencies.description: Uses privacy rules to keep reporting aggregate and compliant.
Uses intelligence models to surface account health and topic demand.

dataDependencies.description: Owns aggregate employer reporting outputs.

bricks.name: Employer Live Events Program
bricks.description: Program design, event packaging, staffing, and launch workflows for employer-specific live events.

internalModules.title: Event program orchestration
internalModules.description: Coordinates employer event requests, contributor staffing, and event setup.

interfaces.title: Event program UI
interfaces.description: Internal and employer-facing workflows for planning live events.

brickDependencies.description: Uses contributor and session availability to staff employer events.
Uses live delivery to execute employer events.

rootGroups.name: Contributor Network
rootGroups.description: Contributor identity, publishing, scheduling, moderation, and payout capabilities.

bricks.name: Contributor Profiles and Credentials
bricks.description: Contributor identity, credentials, topic coverage, and opportunity fit surfaces.

internalModules.title: Contributor profile service
internalModules.description: Stores contributor identity, credentials, and coverage metadata.

interfaces.title: Contributor profile UI
interfaces.description: Contributor-facing and member-visible profile experiences.

brickDependencies.description: Uses trust status and compliance checks before contributor activation.

dataDependencies.description: Owns contributor identity and credential objects.

bricks.name: Content Studio and Publishing
bricks.description: Contributor publishing workflows for recorded sessions, articles, and structured support content.

internalModules.title: Publishing workflow service
internalModules.description: Supports content drafting, review, approval, and publishing.

interfaces.title: Contributor studio UI
interfaces.description: Contributor-facing publishing and content management workspace.

brickDependencies.description: Uses content moderation and review before publication.

dataDependencies.description: Stores recorded content and publishing metadata.

bricks.name: Session Scheduling and Availability
bricks.description: Scheduling, availability, booking, and session slot coordination for contributors and employers.

internalModules.title: Scheduling engine
internalModules.description: Matches contributor availability, session slots, and employer requests.

interfaces.title: Scheduling API
interfaces.description: Scheduling interface for contributors, live sessions, and employer events.

brickDependencies.description: Uses contributor profile and availability metadata.

bricks.name: Safety Moderation and Escalation
bricks.description: Cross-platform moderation, trust review, escalation handling, and incident workflows.

internalModules.title: Moderation queue and escalation engine
internalModules.description: Processes content, session, and participant safety concerns.

interfaces.title: Moderation operations UI
interfaces.description: Internal trust and safety workspace.

brickDependencies.description: Uses escalation paths and referral guidance for higher-risk situations.

dataDependencies.description: Reads community content for moderation decisions.

bricks.name: Contributor Payouts and Earnings
bricks.description: Contributor earnings visibility, payout workflows, and settlement history.

internalModules.title: Contributor earnings service
internalModules.description: Calculates earnings and exposes payout statements to contributors.

interfaces.title: Contributor earnings UI
interfaces.description: Contributor-facing earnings and payout experience.

brickDependencies.description: Uses revenue and settlement workflows to fund contributor payouts.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Depends on an external payout processor.

dataDependencies.description: Owns contributor payout and settlement records.

rootGroups.name: Trust and Foundations
rootGroups.description: Identity, privacy, care navigation, billing, and intelligence foundations.

bricks.name: Identity and Account Access
bricks.description: Account creation, authentication, pseudonymous participation, and role-based access control.

internalModules.title: Identity and access service
internalModules.description: Manages login, account state, and role-based access.

interfaces.title: Identity API
interfaces.description: Authentication and authorization interface.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Depends on an external identity provider where needed.

dataDependencies.description: Uses member profile data for account state.

bricks.name: Privacy, Consent, and Data Separation
bricks.description: Consent enforcement, pseudonymity controls, and employer-safe data separation policies.

internalModules.title: Privacy policy engine
internalModules.description: Evaluates consent state and reporting rules across all sensitive workflows.

interfaces.title: Privacy policy API
interfaces.description: Policy enforcement interface for consent and data separation.

dataDependencies.description: Owns auditable consent state.

bricks.name: Care Matching and Referral Guidance
bricks.description: Rules and workflows for escalating members toward appropriate support and external care options.

internalModules.title: Referral decision engine
internalModules.description: Determines next-step support and escalation options based on policy and member context.

interfaces.title: Referral guidance API
interfaces.description: Support escalation and referral guidance interface.

brickDependencies.description: Uses resource and care options to support escalation paths.

bricks.name: Resource Directory and Care Navigation
bricks.description: Trusted directory of resources, partner organizations, and next-step support options.

internalModules.title: Resource catalog service
internalModules.description: Stores and serves support resources and referral destinations.

interfaces.title: Resource directory UI
interfaces.description: Member and support-facing resource navigation experience.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Depends on external support providers and partner organizations.

bricks.name: Billing and Revenue Operations
bricks.description: Subscriptions, invoicing, employer billing, settlement, and financial operations.

internalModules.title: Subscription and ledger service
internalModules.description: Maintains subscription state, invoices, and settlement data.

interfaces.title: Billing API
interfaces.description: Billing and settlement interface for subscriptions and payouts.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: Depends on an external payment processor for billing collection.

dataDependencies.description: Reads employer subscription state for invoicing.
Reads payout records to support settlement reconciliation.

bricks.name: AI Recommendations and Program Intelligence
bricks.description: Cross-domain intelligence layer for recommendations, topic demand forecasting, and account health signals.

internalModules.title: Intelligence model serving
internalModules.description: Generates recommendation features, demand forecasts, and account health signals.

interfaces.title: Intelligence API
interfaces.description: Serves model features and account intelligence across the platform.

dataDependencies.description: Reads support interaction data to train and serve intelligence signals.
Reads aggregate program data for account-health and topic-demand models.
